title: Partner/beneficiary outreach (research lab and/or advocacy org)
context: M0 outreach to move verifiedNeed from false toward a secured beneficiary (research lab and/or advocacy org). Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Draft and log a partner/beneficiary outreach package targeting a research lab and/or advocacy org, recording at least one outreach attempt.
acceptanceCriteria: Outreach package describes the project, the verified-open inventory value, and the specific deliverable being offered.
At least one partner-outreach attempt is logged with date and target.
Clarifies that securing a partner is what flips verifiedNeed to true.
